predictedBugs: Missing transition from discovery states back to brownfield-discovered instead of directly to feature-empty — user may not be able to skip discovery properly
Guard conditions reference runtime variables (qaVerdict, userDecision) that may not be available at transition evaluation time in the engine
Legacy states (feature-planning, feature-planned, feature-todo) have no transitions out to new pipeline states — could orphan features caught in legacy flow
edgeCases: What happens when drift-detected and blocked are set simultaneously? Current model has drift → blocked as explicit transition, but both could be detected at once
Bugfix 'wont-fix' (t202) leads to bugfix-done terminal state without verification — no audit trail for accepted risk
Cross-workflow transitions (feature → bugfix → feature) can create loops — no circuit breaker or max-iteration guard defined
